case_title: HOUSE OF FANS INC. VS BARRON ELECTRIC, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $254.01 FILED BY HOUSE OF FANS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BARRON ELECTRIC, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
